name: Nutty Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a medium saucepan.
2. Add evaporated milk and sugar, stirring until smooth.
3. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in dark chocolate and semi-sweet chocolate until melted and combined.
6. Mix in marshmallow fluff and stir until even.
7. Remove from heat and add peanut butter chips and chopped peanuts.
8. Pour into a greased, foil-lined pan.
9. Allow to cool completely.
10. Chill at least 1 hour before serving. The longer it chills, the firmer it becomes.
